title: Event Cancelled
cancelledMessageLine2: The event is now back in the availability collection phase.
step1: Availability collection is now open again
step2: New time slots will be recalculated in case of a change in availability
step3: You'll receive a new confirmation when a slot is validated again
contact: If you have any questions, contact us at support@slotfinder.com
automated: This is an automated message, please do not reply to this email.
